gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just watered the plants and updated the health metrics for all community apps in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the greenhouse registry.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app showcase up-to-date with the latest health and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot (Monitor Robot) or bot watering plants (apps) in a greenhouse, with Polly the bee observing or helping.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby with a tiny clipboard checking off metrics. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby with a tiny clipboard checking off metrics. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
